top_signals.title: Tech Giants Drive Stocks Lower as Oil Advances: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A selloff in the world’s largest technology companies sent stocks lower, with the market also falling as oil climbed amid a flare-up in tensions in the Middle East that threatens a fragile ceasefire deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Private credit lenders say their big software bet faces an AI reckoning — but not a ‘SaaSpocalypse'
top_signals.summary: Private credit's exposure to software is being tested by AI, as lenders look past “SaaSpocalypse” fears to identify winners and losers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Metals retreat amid Iran conflict and lingering rate-hike concerns
top_signals.summary: Nevertheless, the long-term outlook for metals remains positive.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Mastercard unveils Agent Pay for Machines to support autonomous AI transactions, including stablecoins
top_signals.summary: Mastercard's Agent Pay for Machines infrastructure will support high-volume, low-value payments by autonomous AI agents.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Barr, Efficient and Effective Central Banking: Beyond the Balance Sheet
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Money Marketeers of New York University, New York, New York

top_signals.title: British Columbia court reopens Seabridge Gold’s approval fight
top_signals.summary: The ruling calls into question the substantial-start finding that keeps KSM’s 2014 environmental certificate valid for the project’s life.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Ero Copper sees resource growth potential in Brazil
top_signals.summary: Ero can acquire a 60% interest in the Furnas project under an earn-in agreement with Vale.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Northern Star rejects Elliott push to sale company
top_signals.summary: Australia's top gold miner is rebuffing activist pressure as leadership change and operational challenges weigh on performance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Larvotto Resources inks gold offtake deal with Glencore
top_signals.summary: Deal is for the sale of gold concentrate for 7 years from its Hillgrove antimony-gold project in New South Wales.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: EU agrees to accelerate defence industrial base ramp-up and simplify defence procurement
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 10 Jun 2026 The European Commission welcomes the provisional political agreement reached today between the European Parliament and the Council of the EU to simplify security and defence procurement, facilitate defence investments and support the defence industry.
